scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Female waitress (image2) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron untied and hanging off one shoulder scrolls her phone openly, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who stands nearby facing her. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: blonde female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron. Customers seated in red booths. Warm afternoon light. No customers behind counter.
